name: SiteGPT
description: SiteGPT — AI chatbot platform trained on website content for automated customer support and lead qualification.

seo.title: SiteGPT — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: SiteGPT: SiteGPT — AI chatbot platform trained on website content for automated customer support and lead qualification.

when_to_use: Deploying a chatbot trained on website content for visitor support
Building knowledge base assistants from existing documentation sites
Automating FAQ answering without manual chatbot training
Adding an AI support widget to SaaS apps from existing content

pros: Fast setup — crawl site, get a bot
cons: Thin moat vs dozens of RAG chatbots
review.verdict: A tidy website-to-chatbot wrapper — fine for SMBs, but engineering teams will outgrow it quickly.
review.best_for: SMB marketing teams wanting a site chatbot without writing code
review.not_for: Developers needing fine-grained RAG control or custom retrieval pipelines
